/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libVehicleLib.so -o libVehicleLib.so CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/VehicleLib_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/src/model/Vehicle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/src/model/Car.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/src/model/Bike.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/src/model/Truck.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/src/model/Bus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/src/model/Motorcycle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/src/model/ElectricScooter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VehicleLib.dir/src/factory/VehicleFactory.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
